title: Tigerpaw Dashboard
subtitle: Your AI trades. You decide.
tradingHubDesc: Risk dashboard, approval queue, positions, and trade history
riskSettingsDesc: Configure risk tiers, approval modes, and position limits
securityDesc: Security audit, credential status, and extension permissions
killSwitchActiveDesc: All trading is halted. Go to Trading Hub to resume.
disconnectDesc: This will stop all trading on this platform. Open positions will not be automatically closed. You can reconnect at any time.
